# Scan Context++: Structural Place Recognition Robust to Rotation and Lateral Variations in Urban Environments:

- **Work ID:** `LPR-066`
- **Reviewed version:** `arxiv:2109.13494`
- **Year / venue:** 2021 / TRO

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI 00/08, MulRan KAIST03/Riverside02/Sejong01-02, Oxford Radar RobotCar 2019-01-11 and 2019-01-15, NAVER LABS Pangyo, KA Urban Campus 1 — `source_fact`; manual, p. 8–10, § Abstract;III-IV. Descriptor;V-VII. Evaluation, Fig. 3-19;Table I-VIII
- **input_unit:** single raw range scan projected to a bird's-eye-view structural descriptor — `source_fact`; manual, p. 3–5, § Abstract;III-IV. Descriptor;V-VII. Evaluation, Fig. 3-19;Table I-VIII
- **invariances:** heading rotation for Polar Context, lateral translation for Cart Context, combined rotation/lateral robustness through root-shift augmentation, limited roll, pitch and height robustness under mild motion — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 5–18, § Abstract;III-IV. Descriptor;V-VII. Evaluation, Fig. 3-19;Table I-VIII
- **representation:** Polar Context and Cart Context max-height matrices, compact retrieval key and KD-tree candidate search, aligning-key pre-alignment, full-descriptor similarity rejection, root-shift descriptor augmentation, 1-DoF yaw or lateral-offset estimate — `source_fact`; manual, p. 3–7, § Abstract;III-IV. Descriptor;V-VII. Evaluation, Fig. 3-19;Table I-VIII
- **uses_learning:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–18, § Abstract;III-IV. Descriptor;V-VII. Evaluation, Fig. 3-19;Table I-VIII
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–18, § Abstract;III-IV. Descriptor;V-VII. Evaluation, Fig. 3-19;Table I-VIII
